_meta.purpose: Resolve the unresolved узел ESR fragmenting the kniga3 backbone graph (TARIFF_MASTER_AUDIT.md H9). Maps oldKey (synthetic-узел ESR or contested-region ESR) -> resolution. Synthetic Москва/СПб hubs are split onto their curated member-station ESRs; contested-region/styk codes keep their existing real ESR and are FLAGGED (no fabrication, no name-collision remap).
_meta.noFabricationPolicy: No ESR invented. Synthetic hubs resolved ONLY to member ESRs present in hub-distances.json and cross-checked against station CSV. Contested-region/styk codes are NOT remapped to fuzzy CSV name-matches (different road/legacy admin) — they keep their existing backbone ESR and stay flagged for operator/primary-source resolution.
_meta.engineConsumption: This file is a documentation/resolution overlay. It is NOT loaded by repository.ts and does NOT rewrite uzel-graph.json — the runtime graph and all distance oracles (2444/699/3108/Решетниково-1432) are unaffected. A future engine pass may use memberEsrs to implement the same-line узловая-надбавка exclusion (H3).

resolutions.name: Московский узел
resolutions.source: hub-distances.json lineByEsr membership (curated ТР-4 узел lines); each member ESR cross-checked against rzd/cis station CSV (csvVerified flag per member)
resolutions.engineNote: 000015/000023 are abstract обобщенные транзитные пункты, NOT physical stations. The +54/+25 km узловая надбавка stays attached to the synthetic node; member ESRs identify which physical stations the узел aggregates so the same-line exclusion (H3) can be evaluated. Do NOT collapse the synthetic node onto a single member — keep it as a hub and route through these member boundary stations.

resolutions.engineNote: 000015/000023 are abstract обобщенные транзитные пункты, NOT physical stations. The +54/+25 km узловая надбавка stays attached to the synthetic node; member ESRs identify which physical stations the узел aggregates so the same-line exclusion (H3) can be evaluated. Do NOT collapse the synthetic node onto a single member — keep it as a hub and route through these member boundary stations.

resolutions.name: Климов (эксп.)
resolutions.source: backbone (kniga3) already carries this 6-digit ESR; no row in current CSV vintage (2023 RF / 2020 CIS). Name-only CSV candidates are different stations on other roads — NOT a confident 1:1, so NOT remapped.
resolutions.reason: export styk (экспортный стык) — boundary connector; existing backbone ESR retained verbatim. Remapping to a name-collision ESR would corrupt routing. Needs operator/Книга-3 styk table to confirm.

resolutions.name: Канисай (рзд) (эксп.)
resolutions.source: backbone (kniga3) already carries this 6-digit ESR; no row in current CSV vintage (2023 RF / 2020 CIS). Name-only CSV candidates are different stations on other roads — NOT a confident 1:1, so NOT remapped.
resolutions.reason: export styk (экспортный стык) — boundary connector; existing backbone ESR retained verbatim. Remapping to a name-collision ESR would corrupt routing. Needs operator/Книга-3 styk table to confirm.

resolutions.name: Джанкой
resolutions.source: backbone (kniga3) carries this 6-digit ESR; absent from 2023 RF / 2020 CIS CSV vintage. Crimea (47xxxx) / Donbass / Lugansk / Zaporozhye stations have shifted администрация and ESR allocation; CSV name-matches resolve to legacy Приднепровская/Донецкая (Ukrainian-era) codes that are NOT the current tariff ESR.
resolutions.reason: contested-region: existing backbone ESR retained verbatim. Name-match candidates point to a different (legacy) ESR; remapping would silently corrupt these legs. Needs current РЖД/ФГУП КЖД styk distance table to resolve confidently.

Crimea (47xxxx) / Donbass / Lugansk / Zaporozhye stations have shifted администрация and ESR allocation; CSV name-matches resolve to legacy Приднепровская/Донецкая (Ukrainian-era) codes that are NOT the current tariff ESR.
resolutions.reason: contested-region: existing backbone ESR retained verbatim. Name-match candidates point to a different (legacy) ESR; remapping would silently corrupt these legs. Needs current РЖД/ФГУП КЖД styk distance table to resolve confidently.
